title: Belgian driver surrenders after fatal hit-and-run near Hazeldonk
title_zh: 比利时司机在哈泽尔东克附近发生致命撞车逃逸后自首
description: A man was found dead Saturday morning on the service road parallel to the A16 near Hazeldonk, authorities said. Police believe he was struck by a vehicle.
description_zh: 当局称，周六早上，一名男子在Hazeldonk附近与A16公路平行的辅路上被发现死亡。警方认为他被车撞死。

title: Many Dutch patients return from Belgium after failed fertility treatments
title_zh: 许多荷兰患者在生育治疗失败后从比利时返回
description: Thousands of Dutch couples travel to Belgium each year seeking fertility treatments, but research shows a significant number return to the Netherlands after unsuccessful procedures.
description_zh: 每年有数千对荷兰夫妇前往比利时寻求生育治疗，但研究表明，相当多的夫妇在治疗失败后返回荷兰。

title: Minor injured in Amsterdam West shooting, police investigate
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹西部枪击案造成轻伤，警方正在调查
description: A minor was injured Friday afternoon in a shooting on Hudsonstraat in the West district of Amsterdam,
description_zh: 周五下午，阿姆斯特丹西区哈德森街发生枪击事件，一名未成年人受伤。

title: Suspect arrested following morning shooting in Amsterdam Zuid
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹南区早晨发生枪击案，嫌疑人被捕
description: Police arrested a suspect after a shooting on Hectorstraat in Amsterdam Zuid on Saturday morning. Authorities have not confirmed whether anyone was injured.
description_zh: 周六上午，阿姆斯特丹南区赫克托街发生枪击事件，警方逮捕了一名嫌疑人。目前，当局尚未确认是否有人受伤。

title: Dutch parliament against Danish plan to monitor EU citizens’ chat messages
title_zh: 荷兰议会反对丹麦监控欧盟公民聊天信息的计划
description: The Tweede Kamer is pressing the Dutch government to prevent the European Union from adopting a proposal that would allow "preventive monitoring" of private online messages across Europe.
description_zh: 荷兰议会正在敦促荷兰政府阻止欧盟采纳一项允许对整个欧洲的私人在线信息进行“预防性监控”的提案。

title: Video: Car smashes through Hulst home, driver under influence and loses license
title_zh: 视频：汽车撞毁赫尔斯特家，司机酒驾，吊销驾照
description: A 20-year-old man from Hulst drove his car straight through the front door of a house on Havikdijk early Saturday morning, leaving the home heavily damaged and forcing firefighters to stabilize the
description_zh: 周六凌晨，一名来自 Hulst 的 20 岁男子驾车直接冲破 Havikdijk 一户人家的前门，导致房屋严重受损，迫使消防员稳定房屋

title: Dutch government will fine employers who misclassify self-employed workers
title_zh: 荷兰政府将对错误分类自雇工人的雇主处以罚款
description: The caretaker Dutch cabinet said it is “undesirable” to extend the suspension of fines for employers who hire self-employed workers (zzp’ers) for jobs that should be done by regular employees.
description_zh: 荷兰看守内阁表示，对于雇用自雇工人（zzp'ers）从事本应由正式雇员完成的工作的雇主，延长暂停罚款的期限是“不可取的”。

title: Dutch consumers face higher prices as major firms dominate key markets, watchdogs warn
title_zh: 监管机构警告称，由于大公司主导关键市场，荷兰消费者面临更高的价格
description: Consumers in the Netherlands are reportedly facing higher prices and fewer choices as major banks, energy firms, supermarkets, health insurers, and internet providers increasingly dominate key mark
description_zh: 据报道，由于大型银行、能源公司、超市、健康保险公司和互联网提供商日益占据关键市场，荷兰消费者面临着价格上涨和选择减少的局面。

title: Explosion damages Albert Heijn entrance in Dordrecht; No injuries reported
title_zh: 爆炸损坏了多德雷赫特的 Albert Heijn 入口；没有受伤报告
description: An explosion damaged the entrance of an Albert Heijn supermarket in Dordrecht early Saturday,
description_zh: 周六凌晨，多德雷赫特一家 Albert Heijn 超市的入口发生爆炸，

title: Train strikes car at Boxtel crossing; Driver suspected of drunk driving
title_zh: 火车在博克斯特尔道口撞上汽车；司机涉嫌酒驾
description: A train collided with a car Friday evening at a railway crossing in Boxtel, but no one was injured, according to
description_zh: 周五晚上，一列火车在博克斯特尔的一个铁路道口与一辆汽车相撞，但无人受伤。

title: Podcast: The Wouter Koolmees Is Watching You Edition
title_zh: 播客：Wouter Koolmees 正在看着你版
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想要支持 DutchNews 播客并持续供应我们的荷兰焦糖华夫饼和橙子番茄酱吗？点击此处成为……

title: Schiedam enforces security measures ahead of pro- and anti-asylum center demonstrations
title_zh: 斯希丹在支持和反对庇护中心的示威活动前加强安全措施
description: The municipality of Schiedam is implementing security measures ahead of two planned demonstrations Saturday concerning the opening of a new asylum seekers center.
description_zh: 斯希丹市政府正在为周六举行的两场有关开设新的寻求庇护者中心的示威活动采取安全措施。

title: Netherlands commits €55 million to rebuild Ukraine’s infrastructure
title_zh: 荷兰承诺拨款5500万欧元重建乌克兰基础设施
description: The Netherlands will invest 55 million euros to repair critical infrastructure in Ukraine, part of a broader 252 million euro package of non-military support planned for 2026.
description_zh: 荷兰将投资 5500 万欧元修复乌克兰的关键基础设施，这是计划于 2026 年实施的 2.52 亿欧元非军事支持计划的一部分。

title: Storm Amy cancels around 150 flights at Schiphol, disrupts roads across Netherlands
title_zh: 风暴“艾米”导致史基浦机场约 150 个航班取消，荷兰各地道路中断
description: More than 150 flights were canceled atSchiphol Airporton Saturday as Storm Amy moves across the Netherlands, bringing winds of up to 100 kilom
description_zh: 周六，风暴“艾米”横扫荷兰，带来高达 100 公里的强风，史基浦机场 150 多个航班被取消

title: Ten Dutch activists detained in Israeli prison after Gaza flotilla interception
title_zh: 加沙船队被拦截后，十名荷兰活动人士被关押在以色列监狱
description: Ten Dutch participants in the Global Sumud Flotilla to Gaza remain detained in Israel’s Ketziot Prison in the Negev Desert, the Dutch Ministry of Foreign Affairs confirmed Friday.
description_zh: 荷兰外交部周五证实，参加前往加沙的全球苏穆德船队的十名荷兰参与者仍被关押在内盖夫沙漠的以色列凯齐奥特监狱。

title: Cabinet backs housing minister's plan to ban refugee priority for social housing
title_zh: 内阁支持住房部长禁止难民优先获得社会住房的计划
description: Caretaker Housing Minister Mona Keijzer will proceed with her proposal banning municipalities from
description_zh: 看守住房部长 Mona Keijzer 将继续推进她的提案，禁止市政当局

title: Storm Amy triggers nationwide code yellow in Netherlands
title_zh: 风暴“艾米”在荷兰引发全国黄色警报
description: The KNMI expanded its Code Yellow weather warning to the entire Netherlands on Saturday as storm Amy brought strong wind gusts across the country.
description_zh: 由于风暴“艾米”给荷兰带来强风，荷兰气象局周六将黄色预警范围扩大至整个荷兰。

title: Man who fatally stabbed 11-year-old girl is "mentally incompetent," experts conclude
title_zh: 专家认定，刺死 11 岁女孩的男子“精神失常”
description: Hamazh L., the 29-year-old man suspected ofstabbing an 11-year-old girl to deat
description_zh: 29 岁的男子 Hamazh L. 涉嫌刺死一名 11 岁女孩

title: Couple must repay €42,615 in benefits after selling goods online via classified ads
title_zh: 夫妇通过分类广告在线销售商品后须偿还 42,615 欧元的福利金
description: A couple from Breda must repay 42,615 euros in social assistance after authorities found they ran a small business selling bicycles, scooters, paintings, and household items on Marktplaats while re
description_zh: 布雷达的一对夫妇必须偿还 42,615 欧元的社会救助金，因为当局发现他们在 Marktplaats 经营一家小企业，销售自行车、摩托车、绘画和家居用品，同时

title: NAM won't be prosecuted for creating life-threatening danger with Groningen earthquakes
title_zh: NAM 不会因格罗宁根地震造成生命危险而被起诉
description: The Nederlandse Aardolie Maatschappij (NAM) will not be prosecuted for intentionally damaging buildings resulting in “a significant risk to life,” the Leeuwarden Court of Appeal ruled on
description_zh: 吕伐登上诉法院于 2019 年 1 月 23 日裁定，荷兰建筑工人协会 (NAM) 不会因故意损坏建筑物造成“重大生命危险”而被起诉。

title: Several Dutch offshore wind turbines halted to protect migrating birds
title_zh: 荷兰多座海上风力涡轮机停运以保护候鸟
description: Several Dutch offshore wind farms, including Borssele 1 & 2, Borssele 3 & 4, Hollandse Kust Zuid, and Hollandse Kust Noord, have been temporarily shut down to protect migrating birds,
description_zh: 荷兰多个海上风电场，包括 Borssele 1 & 2、Borssele 3 & 4、Hollandse Kust Zuid 和 Hollandse Kust Noord 已暂时关闭，以保护候鸟，

title: Study warns Netherlands is far from meeting nitrogen emissions targets in nature
title_zh: 研究警告荷兰远未达到自然界氮排放目标
description: Nitrogen deposition in natural areas is decreasing, but the likelihood of reaching legally established targets is “very small” if no additional measures are taken, according to a study by the Natio
description_zh: 根据国家海洋和大气管理局的一项研究，自然区域的氮沉降正在减少，但如果不采取额外措施，达到法定目标的可能性“非常小”。

title: Storm Amy prompts KLM to cancel 138 flights on Saturday; Gusts up to 100 km/h
title_zh: 风暴“艾米”导致荷兰皇家航空公司周六取消 138 个航班；阵风高达 100 公里/小时
description: Dutch airline KLM preemptively cancelled 138 flights to and from Schiphol Airport near Amsterdam on Saturday because of Storm Amy, the weather event that has
description_zh: 荷兰皇家航空公司周六因风暴“艾米”提前取消了往返阿姆斯特丹附近史基浦机场的 138 个航班。这场天气事件

title: The Netherlands wants Houthis added to EU terrorist list after cargo ship attack
title_zh: 货船袭击事件后，荷兰希望将胡塞武装列入欧盟恐怖分子名单
description: TheHouthi militia in Yemen has claimed responsibility for attacking the Dutch cargo shipMV Mi
description_zh: 也门胡塞武装声称对袭击荷兰货船 MV Mi 负责

title: Amsterdam extends metro hours to aid Amsterdam Dance Event festivalgoers in October
title_zh: 十月份，阿姆斯特丹延长地铁运营时间，以方便阿姆斯特丹舞蹈节的参与者
description: The Amsterdam metro will operate longer hours during the Amsterdam Dance Event (ADE),
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹地铁将在阿姆斯特丹舞蹈活动（ADE）期间延长运营时间，

title: Dutch cultural institutions launch boycott of Israel over human rights concerns
title_zh: 荷兰文化机构因人权问题发起抵制以色列活动
description: A group of 250 cultural institutions in the Netherlands and Belgium has announced a cultural boycott of Israel.
description_zh: 荷兰和比利时的 250 家文化机构宣布对以色列进行文化抵制。

title: Dutch cabinet presses ahead with refugee “priority” housing plan
title_zh: 荷兰内阁推进难民“优先”住房计划
description: The caretaker cabinet said on Friday it is pressing ahead with legislation that would remove the “priority” some refugees are...
description_zh: 看守内阁周五表示，正在推进一项立法，取消部分难民的“优先权”......

title: PostNL delivery times to increase to three days starting 2027
title_zh: 荷兰邮政2027年投递时间将延长至三天
description: The caretaker cabinet is granting PostNL an earlier extension of delivery times for personal mail. Starting in 2027, letters and cards may take up to three days to reach recipients.
description_zh: 看守内阁批准荷兰邮政提前延长个人邮件的投递时间。从2027年起，信件和卡片最多可能需要三天才能送达收件人。

title: “The Netherlands has stood still for 15 years,” says Rob Jetten
title_zh: “荷兰已经停滞了 15 年，”罗布·杰滕说
description: The Liberal Democratic party D66 is set to make gains in the general election at the end of this month....
description_zh: 自民党 D66 预计将在本月底的大选中取得进展......

title: Drone sightings over Europe raise security concerns, Dutch ministers warn
title_zh: 荷兰部长警告称，欧洲无人机目击事件引发安全担忧
description: The report of drones seen over a military site in Belgium fits a “worrying pattern” that has been visible for some time, according to caretaker Defense Minister Ruben Brekelmans.
description_zh: 看守国防部长鲁本·布雷克尔曼斯 (Ruben Brekelmans) 表示，比利时军事基地上空发现无人机的报道符合一段时间以来出现的“令人担忧的模式”。

title: “Every voice should be heard”: internationals take on critics
title_zh: “每个声音都应该被听到”：国际人士回应批评
description: Some think “expats” refuse to integrate – others believe the Netherlands has broken its promise of a multicultural society that...
description_zh: 一些人认为“外籍人士”拒绝融入——另一些人则认为荷兰违背了其多元文化社会的承诺……

title: Oranje manager Ronald Koeman calls up AZ striker Mexx Meerdink for World Cup qualifiers
title_zh: 橙衣军团主教练罗纳德·科曼征召阿尔克马尔前锋梅克斯·米尔丁克参加世界杯预选赛
description: Dutch national football team manager Ronald Koeman has announced his squad for the World Cup qualifying matches against Malta and Finland.
description_zh: 荷兰国家足球队主教练罗纳德·科曼公布了荷兰国家足球队参加对阵马耳他和芬兰的世界杯预选赛的阵容。

title: Vlaardingen foster parents no longer charged with manslaughter in girl's severe abuse
title_zh: 弗拉尔丁恩寄养父母不再因虐待女孩而被判过失杀人罪
description: Prosecutors have dropped the charge ofattempted manslaughteragainst two
description_zh: 检察官撤销了对两人企图杀人罪的指控

title: Youth left burdened by student debt despite being victims of child benefits scandal
title_zh: 尽管是儿童福利丑闻的受害者，但青少年仍背负着学生债务

description_zh: 鹿特丹-莱蒙德、阿姆斯特丹、海牙/莱岑丹-沃尔堡、乌得勒支和奈梅亨的当地青年监察员

title: Over 250 arts organisations call for cultural boycott of Israel
title_zh: 超过250个艺术组织呼吁抵制以色列的文化
description: Over 250 cultural organisations, theatre companies, and festivals in the Netherlands and Belgium have signed a statement calling for a...
description_zh: 荷兰和比利时的 250 多个文化组织、剧院和艺术节签署了一份声明，呼吁......

title: Supreme Court scraps ban on exporting F-35 parts to Israel, but orders gov't to reassess
title_zh: 最高法院取消向以色列出口 F-35 零部件的禁令，但命令政府重新评估
description: TheSupreme Courtscrapped an appeals cou
description_zh: 最高法院废除了上诉法院

title: Wilders' tale of trash collector attacked by Moroccans was a simple "traffic dispute"
title_zh: 威尔德斯讲述的摩洛哥人袭击垃圾收集员的故事只是一场简单的“交通纠纷”
description: The story PVV Geert Wilders told in the budget debate about a Utrecht trash collector getting severely assaulted with “twenty Moroccans interfering” was a traffic dispute.
description_zh: 自由党议员吉尔特·威尔德斯 (Geert Wilders) 在预算辩论中讲述了乌得勒支一名垃圾收集员遭到“二十名摩洛哥人干扰”的严重袭击的故事，这是一场交通纠纷。

title: Minister must decide on F-35 spare parts, top Dutch court rules
title_zh: 荷兰最高法院裁定部长必须决定F-35备件
description: The Dutch foreign affairs minister David van Weel must decide himself whether to resume the export of fighter jet parts...
description_zh: 荷兰外交大臣戴维·范威尔必须自己决定是否恢复战斗机零部件的出口……

title: Amsterdam man arrested for financing terrorism with bitcoin
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹男子因使用比特币资助恐怖主义而被捕
description: A man from Amsterdam was arrested this week on suspicion of terrorist financing with bitcoins and violating the Sanctions Act, the FIOD
description_zh: 本周，一名来自阿姆斯特丹的男子因涉嫌使用比特币进行恐怖主义融资和违反制裁法而被捕，FIOD

title: King criticises Privé over photo of princess Alexia with Antoon
title_zh: 国王批评 Privé 拍摄公主 Alexia 与 Antoon 的合影
description: King Willem-Alexander has condemned gossip magazine Privé for publishing a photo showing princess Alexia with pop singer Antoon, saying the...
description_zh: 国王威廉亚历山大谴责八卦杂志 Privé 刊登了公主亚历克西亚与流行歌手安东的合影，称......

title: Two killed in separate stabbing incidents in Purmerend and Lent; Two suspects in custody
title_zh: 皮尔默伦德和伦特发生持刀伤人事件，两人死亡；两名嫌疑人被拘留
description: There were two fatal stabbings in the Netherlands on Thursday. A person was stabbed to death in a home in Purmerend.
description_zh: 周四，荷兰发生两起致命刺伤事件。一人在皮尔默伦德的一处民宅内被刺身亡。

title: Attempt to hang far-right version of Dutch flag on D66 office in The Hague
title_zh: 试图在海牙 D66 办公室悬挂极右翼荷兰国旗
description: The police in The Hague are investigating a failed attempt to hang a Prinsenvlag, a version of the Dutch flag widely used in far-right groups, on the D66 party office in the city, NOS
description_zh: 海牙警方正在调查一起未遂事件，该事件发生在 D66 党办公室，这是极右翼团体广泛使用的荷兰国旗版本。

title: Stormy weekend ahead with rain and cooler temperatures
title_zh: 周末将有暴风雨，降雨，气温下降
description: The weather will turn unsettled this weekend, with Saturday expected to be the most turbulent day, according to weather forecaster...
description_zh: 据气象预报员称，本周末天气将变得不稳定，预计周六将是最动荡的一天……

title: Parliament breaks for election campaign after marathon final day
title_zh: 马拉松式最后一天结束后，议会休会进行竞选活动
description: The Dutch parliament has entered a four-week recess ahead of the general election on 29 October, bringing regular debates and...
description_zh: 荷兰议会在 10 月 29 日大选前进入为期四周的休会期，进行定期辩论和……

title: Gov’t must improve foreigner worker rights, better regulation
title_zh: 政府必须改善外国工人的权利，加强监管
description: The government must do more to regulate labour migration, focusing on attracting skilled foreign workers needed to sustain the economy...
description_zh: 政府必须采取更多措施来规范劳动力迁移，重点吸引维持经济所需的熟练外国工人......

title: Banks expect to cut 2,600 money laundering check jobs: FD
title_zh: FD：银行预计将裁减2600个洗钱检查岗位
description: Dutch banks expect to shed around 2,600 jobs in their anti–money laundering departments within two years as they turn to...
description_zh: 荷兰银行预计将在两年内裁减反洗钱部门约 2,600 个工作岗位，因为他们将转向……

title: More consolidation as health insurance giant VGZ takes over ONVZ
title_zh: 健康保险巨头 VGZ 收购 ONVZ，整合进一步加强
description: One of the big four Dutch health insurance companies VGZ is taking over its smaller rival ONVZ, if the competition...
description_zh: 如果竞争加剧，荷兰四大健康保险公司之一的 VGZ 将收购其规模较小的竞争对手 ONVZ……

title: Go Ahead Eagles soar on disappointing night for Dutch football
title_zh: 荷兰足球令人失望的夜晚，前进之鹰队大放异彩
description: Go Ahead Eagles, in their second ever European football appearance, were the only shining light in another disappointing evening for...
description_zh: 前进之鹰队第二次参加欧洲足球赛，但却是又一个令人失望的夜晚中唯一的亮点......

title: Police arrest 205 people at Gaza-support protest around Hague Central Station
title_zh: 海牙中央车站附近支持加沙抗议活动，警方逮捕 205 人
description: The Hague police arrested 205 people at a Gaza-support protest at Den Haag Central Station on Thursday evening.
description_zh: 海牙警方周四晚间在海牙中央火车站举行的支持加沙抗议活动中逮捕了 205 人。

title: Single first-time buyers increasingly able to buy a home, but often parents' help
title_zh: 单身首次购房者越来越有能力买房，但通常需要父母的帮助
description: Single first-time buyers are increasingly gaining a foothold in the home-buying market.
description_zh: 单身首次购房者在购房市场中的地位日益提高。

title: More than 200 arrested at pro-Palestinian protest in The Hague
title_zh: 海牙亲巴勒斯坦抗议活动中超过 200 人被捕
description: Police say they arrested 205 people on Thursday evening after pro-Palestinian protesters occupied parts of The Hague’s central station, halting...
description_zh: 警方称，周四晚上，亲巴勒斯坦抗议者占领了海牙中央车站的部分区域，并阻止了抗议活动，警方逮捕了 205 人……

title: MP's against gov't plan to relax the rental housing law; Parliament closes for election
title_zh: 议员反对政府放宽租赁住房法的计划；议会因选举而休会
description: Parliament again resisted caretaker Housing Minister Mona Keijzer’s plans to relax the law that regulates rent in the mid-segment of the rental market.
description_zh: 议会再次否决了看守住房部长莫娜·凯泽 (Mona Keijzer) 放宽租赁市场中段租金监管法律的计划。

title: Former Vitesse coach faces community service for sending sexual messages to 16-year-old
title_zh: 前维特斯队教练因向 16 岁少女发送性信息而面临社区服务
description: The Public Prosecution Service (OM) has recommended 100 hours of community service against Marc H., 41, a former youth trainer of the Arnhem professional football club Vitesse.
description_zh: 公共检察署 (OM) 建议对阿纳姆职业足球俱乐部 Vitesse 前青年教练马克·H. (41 岁) 判处 100 小时社区服务。

title: European Sleeper working on night trains to Barcelona and Milan
title_zh: 欧洲卧铺列车在前往巴塞罗那和米兰的夜间列车上工作
description: European Sleeper is working on two new destinations.
description_zh: 欧洲卧铺列车正在开发两个新目的地。

title: Feyenoord suffer second defeat in a row in the UEFA Europa League against Aston Villa
title_zh: 费耶诺德在欧联杯中连续第二次输给阿斯顿维拉
description: Feyenoord were defeated in their second UEFA Europa League game in a row on Thursday. The Rotterdammers lost 2-0 to Aston Villa in De Kuip.
description_zh: 费耶诺德队周四在欧联杯比赛中遭遇连败，在德奎普球场以0-2不敌阿斯顿维拉队。

title: AZ Alkmaar embarrassed with 4-0 defeat against Cypriot side AEK Larnaca
title_zh: AZ 阿尔克马尔以 0-4 惨败给塞浦路斯球队 AEK 拉纳卡
description: AZ Alkmaar suffered an embarrassing defeat at the hands of AEK Larnaca in Cyprus on Thursday.
description_zh: 周四，阿尔克马尔队在塞浦路斯惨败给拉纳卡 AEK 队。

title: Go Ahead Eagles pick up shock victory in Greece; FC Utrecht lose away to SK Brann
title_zh: 前进之鹰在希腊爆冷获胜；乌得勒支队客场输给布兰恩队
description: Go Ahead Eagles picked up a shock 2-1 victory away to Greek side Panathinaikos in the UEFA Europa League on Thursday.
description_zh: 前进之鹰队周四在欧足联欧洲联赛中客场以 2-1 爆冷战胜希腊球队帕纳辛奈科斯队。

title: More far-right rioters found guilty of attacking police; No jail time
title_zh: 更多极右翼暴徒因袭击警察被判有罪；无需入狱
description: A summary court judge in The Hague handed down up to 60 hours of community service and conditionally suspended prison sentences to those accused of violence against police officers during the riots
description_zh: 海牙一名简易法庭法官对那些被指控在骚乱期间对警察施暴的人判处最多 60 小时的社区服务，并有条件地缓刑

title: Tax office says it has to work with Microsoft, despite data privacy concerns
title_zh: 税务局表示，尽管存在数据隐私问题，但仍必须与微软合作
description: The Dutch Tax Administration plans to shift much of its digital workplace to Microsoft’s cloud services, caretaker State Secretary Eugène Heijnen (Tax Administration) told the Tweede Kamer, the low
description_zh: 荷兰税务局计划将其大部分数字工作场所转移到微软的云服务，荷兰税务局看守国务秘书 Eugène Heijnen（税务局）告诉荷兰众议院，低

title: Former asylum minister Faber insists memoir didn’t breach Cabinet secrecy rules
title_zh: 前庇护部长费伯坚称回忆录没有违反内阁保密规定
description: Everything discussed in the new book written by former asylum minister Marjolein Faber was discussed outside the cabinet, the PVV politician has said on the television program Pauw and De Wit.
description_zh: 自由党政客在电视节目 Pauw and De Wit 上表示，前庇护部长 Marjolein Faber 在其新书中讨论的所有内容都是在内阁之外讨论的。

title: Woman stabbed to death by husband asked police for help hours earlier, court told
title_zh: 法庭获悉，被丈夫刺死的女子数小时前曾向警方求助
description: A woman who was fatally stabbed by her husband in Hardenberg had spoken to the police shortly before the incident.
description_zh: 一名在哈登贝格被丈夫刺死的女子在事发前不久曾与警方交谈过。

title: More gonorrhoea and syphilis diagnoses, despite fewer STI consultations
title_zh: 尽管性传播感染咨询次数减少，但淋病和梅毒诊断次数却增加
description: Fewer and fewer people are visiting clinics with questions about a possible sexually transmitted infection (STI).
description_zh: 越来越少的人去诊所询问是否感染了性传播感染 (STI)。

title: LGBTQ failed asylum seekers won’t be sent to Uganda deportation center, minister claims
title_zh: 部长称，LGBTQ 庇护申请失败者不会被送往乌干达驱逐中心
description: People from the LGBTQ community will not be forcibly sent to Uganda under new plans to
description_zh: 根据新计划，LGBTQ 群体不会被强制送往乌干达

title: Remnants of Hurricane Humberto to hit the Netherlands on Saturday; Gusts up to 85 km/h
title_zh: 飓风“温贝托”残余将于周六袭击荷兰；阵风高达 85 公里/小时
description: Strong winds are expected on Saturday due to the remnants of Hurricane Humberto. Morning gusts are expected to reach 75 to 85 kilometers per hour, accompanied by heavy rain.
description_zh: 受飓风温贝托残余影响，预计周六将出现强风。早晨阵风预计达到每小时75至85公里，并伴有大雨。

title: Valkenburg teacher sentenced to 5 years for raping former pupil multiple times
title_zh: 法尔肯堡一名教师因多次强奸前学生被判处 5 年徒刑
description: A former primary school teacher wassentencedto five years in prison for repeatedly raping a student between the
description_zh: 一名前小学教师因多次强奸一名学生而被判处五年监禁。

title: Court rules that linking migrant worker's housing to work is illegal
title_zh: 法院裁定将农民工住房与工作挂钩是违法的
description: A single migrant worker taking on a multi-billion euro employment agency may have changed the way tens of thousands of migrant workers live and work in the Netherlands.
description_zh: 一名移民工人接受价值数十亿欧元的职业介绍所的雇佣可能会改变荷兰数万名移民工人的生活和工作方式。

title: Dutch court orders Meta to let users disable algorithmic timelines
title_zh: 荷兰法院命令 Meta 允许用户禁用算法时间线
description: A Dutch court on Thursday
description_zh: 荷兰法院周四

title: Dutch tax office moves email to Microsoft despite privacy fears
title_zh: 尽管担心隐私问题，荷兰税务局仍将电子邮件迁移至微软
description: The Dutch tax office will move its email and office software to Microsoft’s cloud services despite concerns about privacy, junior...
description_zh: 尽管存在隐私、初级等方面的担忧，荷兰税务局仍将把其电子邮件和办公软件迁移到微软的云服务……

title: Court tells Meta to give Dutch users algorithm-free feed option
title_zh: 法院要求 Meta 为荷兰用户提供无算法推送选项
description: Meta must allow users in the Netherlands to set a chronological, non-algorithmic feed as the default on Instagram and Facebook,...
description_zh: Meta 必须允许荷兰用户将按时间顺序排列的非算法信息流设置为 Instagram 和 Facebook 上的默认信息流……

title: Teen woman randomly stabbed by cyclist in The Hague on Thursday morning
title_zh: 周四早上，海牙一名少女被骑自行车的人随意刺伤
description: An 18-year-old woman was stabbed by a man who was cycling past in The Hague on Thursday morning.
description_zh: 周四早上，一名 18 岁女子在海牙被一名骑自行车经过的男子刺伤。

title: Former primary teacher gets 5 years for repeated rape of pupil
title_zh: 前小学教师因多次强奸学生被判 5 年
description: A former primary school teacher who taught at a school in Valkenburg has been jailed for five years for repeatedly...
description_zh: 一名曾在法尔肯堡一所学校任教的小学教师因多次犯错而被判入狱五年……

title: Dutch Health Council rejects human composting as burial option
title_zh: 荷兰卫生委员会拒绝将人体堆肥作为埋葬方式
description: The Dutch Health Council hasadvisedagainst allowing human c
description_zh: 荷兰卫生委员会建议不要允许人类

title: EU leaders agree on urgent need to innovate in defense, especially drones
title_zh: 欧盟领导人一致认为国防领域亟需创新，尤其是无人机
description: NATO and EU leaders signaled a major acceleration in drone development this week, responding to recent Russian drone incursions into European airspace, NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte said Thursd
description_zh: 北约秘书长马克·吕特周四表示，北约和欧盟领导人本周表示将大力加快无人机研发，以应对俄罗斯无人机近期入侵欧洲领空的事件。

title: Chatbots can’t replace human customer service staff: regulators
title_zh: 监管机构称聊天机器人无法取代人工客服人员
description: Companies that use chatbots for customer service must always give people the option of speaking to a real employee, two...
description_zh: 使用聊天机器人进行客户服务的公司必须始终为人们提供与真实员工交谈的选择，两者......

title: Amsterdam to stop collecting loose garbage bags in an attempt to fight litter
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹将停止收集散装垃圾袋，以减少垃圾
description: The city of Amsterdam will stop collecting individual bags of garbage put on the street. According to the city, these bags cause litter.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市将停止收集街道上的个人垃圾袋。市政府表示，这些垃圾袋造成了垃圾问题。

title: Dutch vessel among those intercepted by Israeli forces off Gaza
title_zh: 以色列军队在加沙海域拦截了多艘荷兰船只
description: Dutch vessel Mohammad Bhar is one of at least 20 intercepted by Israeli troops in their ongoing operation to stop...
description_zh: 荷兰船只“穆罕默德·巴尔”号是以色列军队在持续的阻止行动中拦截的至少 20 艘船只之一......

title: Netherlands to admit critically ill Gaza children, sends €25 million in aid
title_zh: 荷兰接收加沙重症儿童，并提供2500万欧元援助
description: The Dutch caretaker government will admit a "very limited" undisclosed number of children from Gaza in critical condition for treatment in the Netherlands while also committing 25 million euros for
description_zh: 荷兰看守政府将接收“数量非常有限”的危重加沙儿童到荷兰接受治疗，具体人数未透露，同时还将承诺提供 2500 万欧元用于
